title: Eternal Battletowers
description: Climb your way to the top if you can!
body:
**Disclaimer:** Since this is a complete rewrite, updates may be slow until the project is stable. **Description:** Each Battle Tower consists of ten floors. The deeper you descend, the more ruined the floors are, and the stronger the enemies you’ll face. In return, the loot improves with every level. At the final floor, a powerful boss awaits. **Photos:**
Spoiler ![Tower](https://i.imgur.com/VLlopT2.jpeg) ![Inside](https://i.imgur.com/TGBnTWU.jpeg) ![Boss](https://i.imgur.com/0VWLF7c.jpeg) - Resourcepack Used - [Project: OverSimplified](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/os) - Shaders Used - [Rethinking Voxels﻿](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels)
If using the datapack version, be sure to install the [resourcepack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eternal-resourcepack) _Inspiration for this project comes from [Kodaichi Classics](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/1272384-1-7-3-battle-towers-chicken-gliding-kodaichi) and [AtomicStryker's](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/atomicstrykers-battle-towers) Battle Towers._
